text: Here, among art and jest, I sense a lighthearted camaraderie tinged with mischief. Talk of stealing and refinishing vinyl borders play and transgression, and I feel both amused and curious about the unorthodox creativity on display. I am part of something slightly subversive but ultimately harmless, surrounded by people who delight in transformation. It’s as if I’m wandering through an improvised gallery woven from inside jokes and shared projects, playful and reflective at the same time.
